message:
feat(gui): enrich session manager launcher with workspace metadata

Upgrade the GUI launcher overlay to display per-workspace window and
pane counts, mark the active workspace, and sort active-first:

- launcher.rs: new LauncherWorkspaceEntry struct with name, window_count,
  pane_count, is_active; iterate workspace windows/tabs to compute counts;
  sort active first then alphabetical; count_label() helper for
  pluralization; labels show "Current session: X (N windows, M panes)"
  or "Switch to session: X (...)"; "Create new session" replaces
  "Create new Workspace"
- termwindow/mod.rs: launcher title "Launcher" -> "Session Manager";
  add help text "Enter=run/switch  Esc=cancel  /=filter"
- user-guide.md: update Cmd+S description and note about active marker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -106,7 +106,8 @@ frankenterm-gui show-keys --lua
 
 Default session-manager entry point:
 
-- `Cmd+S` opens the launcher (workspace/domain/session switch surface).
+- `Cmd+S` opens the session manager launcher (workspace/domain/session switch surface).
+- Session rows include active/current marker plus window and pane counts.
 
 Global launch options:
